overrides.expect: \mathbf {u} _ {P} (e _ {i}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text {if e_{i} goes from V_{1} to V_{2}}, \\ - 1 & \text {if e_{i} goes from V_{2} to V_{1}}, \\ 0 & \text {if e_{i} \notin E(V_{1} ,V_{2}).} \end{array} \right.
